channel.title: Nodejs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nodejs on Arrans github.io

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: TryGhost/Ghost
item.description: Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: novuhq/novu
item.description: The open-source notification infrastructure. In-app Inbox component, E-mail, SMS, Push and Slack Integrations.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: bitwarden/clients
item.description: Bitwarden client apps (web, browser extension, desktop, and cli).

item.title: Sync-in/server
item.description: Sync-in server · Secure, open-source platform for file storage, sharing, collaboration, and syncing.

item.title: docmd-io/docmd
item.description: Generate minimal, fast & beautiful docs from Markdown. No React, no bloat, just content. Built for developers.

item.title: sindresorhus/caprine
item.description: Elegant Facebook Messenger desktop app

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: pnpm/pnpm
item.description: Fast, disk space efficient package manager

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: chartbrew/chartbrew
item.description: Open-source reporting platform to build and share live dashboards from APIs, SQL and NoSQL databases, with powerful AI assistant, scheduling, and embeddable charts 📈📊

item.title: gommzystudio/device-activity-tracker
item.description: A phone number can reveal whether a device is active, in standby or offline (and more). This PoC demonstrates how delivery receipts + RTT timing leak sensitive device-activity patterns. (WhatsApp / Signal)

item.title: evanwashere/mitata
item.description: benchmark tooling that loves you ❤️

item.title: silexlabs/Silex
item.description: Silex is an online tool for visually creating static sites with dynamic data. With the free/libre spirit of internet, together.

item.title: TheNickOfTime/handbrake-web
item.description: A self-hosted platform to use HandBrake on your headless devices via a bespoke web interface. Harness the processing power of multiple devices to work on a single queue.

item.title: elide-dev/elide
item.description: fast multi-lang runtime

item.title: muety/anchr
item.description: ⚓️ Anchr provides you with a toolbox for tiny tasks on the internet, especially bookmark collections

item.title: gummipunkt/signalcow
item.description: This project provides a web-based platform to manage and interact with a Signal bot. It allows users to register, create groups that correspond to Signal groups, and configure webhooks to send messages to these groups via a REST API.
